event: The King of Morocco leaving to receive a European ambassador
description: A grand scene beneath an enormous horseshoe-shaped Moorish arch. Through the arch, a mounted procession moves forward amid smoke or dust, surrounded by guards with spears and flags. In the foreground, men in white robes prostrate themselves on the ground or sit watching. Others in colorful robes and turbans stand in the crowd at right. The architecture is warm terracotta-orange with intricate carved decoration. Banners in red and green wave above the crowd. The light creates strong shadows under the massive archway.

_meta.title: The King of Morocco Leaving to Receive a European Ambassador
